snippet.title: Lut Gaye (Full Song) Emraan Hashmi, Yukti | Jubin N, Tanishk B, Manoj M | Bhushan K | Radhika-Vinay
snippet.description:

SAINT MARTIN :-
St. Martin's Island is a small island in the northeastern part of the Bay of Bengal, about 9 km south of the tip of the Cox's Bazar-Teknaf peninsula, and forming the southernmost part of Bangladesh. There is a small adjoining island that is separated at high tide, called Chera Dwip.

COX'S BAZAR :-
CoxвАЩs Bazar is a town on the southeast coast of Bangladesh. ItвАЩs known for its very long, sandy beachfront, stretching from Sea Beach in the north to Kolatoli Beach in the south. Aggameda Khyang monastery is home to bronze statues and centuries-old Buddhist manuscripts. South of town, the tropical rainforest of Himchari National Park has waterfalls and many birds. North, sea turtles breed on nearby Sonadia Island.

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account рЯТµ. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFXрЯПЖрЯУИ

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video meinрЯШЙ
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayiрЯШВ
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tusharрЯШВ)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liyeрЯЩМрЯПї)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchuвЭ§пЄП
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab logрЯШВ)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta haiрЯШШ
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.description:
рЯФїNOAKHALI TV -  а¶®аІЛаІЯа¶Ња¶Ца¶Ња¶≤аІА а¶Яа¶ња¶≠а¶њ
Noakhali TV is a community based channel in Noakhali, Bangladesh. The channel is only based on Noakhali, Feni & Lakshmipur, aiming to improve public awareness.

вЮ§NOAKHALI - а¶®аІЛа¶ѓа¶Ља¶Ња¶Ца¶Ња¶≤аІА
Noakhali is a district in South-eastern Bangladesh. It is located in the Chittagong Division. Noakhali district, whose earlier name was Bhulua, was established in 1821. It was named Noakhali in 1868.

вЮ§LAKSHMIPUR or LAXMIPUR DISTRICT - а¶≤а¶ХаІНа¶ЈаІНа¶ЃаІАа¶™аІБа¶∞ а¶ЬаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ
(Lakshmipur Jela also Lakshmipur Zila) with an area of 1455.96 km¬≤, is a district of Bangladesh. It is bordered by Chandpur District to the north, Bhola and Noakhali districts to the south, Noakhali District to the east, and Barisal and Bhola districts to the west.
 It is located in the Chittagong Division. 

вЮ§FENI  DISTRICT - а¶ЂаІЗа¶®аІА а¶ЬаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ
Feni is a district located in the South-Eastern part of Bangladesh Administrative division of Chittagong . As of 2015, the district's estimated population stood at 1,437,371, making it the ninth-most populous district in Chittagong Division. Feni was the part of Greater Noakhali. The administrative hub of the district is in Feni Sadar, in the central section of the district. The original name of the district was Shamshernagar, which served as a sub-district under the district of Noakhali until 15 February 1984.[1] The district consists of six sub-districts: Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Parshuram, Daganbhuiyan, Chhagalnaiya and Feni Sadar.

вЮ§MAIJDEE : 
Maijdee is a town in south eastern Bangladesh, located in Noakhali District, part of the Chittagong Division. Thugarbhanga is the administrative center of Noakhali district and its main town. It is also known as Maijdee court town. It consists of 9 wards and 36 mahallas. It has an area of 12.61 km¬≤.

вЮ§GANDHI ASHRAM : The Gandhi Ashram Trust, also called the Ambika-Kaliganga Charitable Trust, is a philanthropic and development organization working in Noakhali since 1946 with Gandhian philosophy of rural development.

вЮ§NOAKHALI SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY : 
Noakhali Science and Technology University is a public university in the coastal terrain Noakhali of Bangladesh. It is the 27th public university and fifth science and technology university in Bangladesh. Its foundation stone was laid on 11 October 2003 and academic activities started on 22 June 2006.

Noakhali TV is a community based channel in Noakhali, Bangladesh. The channel is only based on Noakhali, Feni & Lakshmipur, aiming to improve public awareness.

вЮ§NOAKHALI - а¶®аІЛа¶ѓа¶Ља¶Ња¶Ца¶Ња¶≤аІА
Noakhali is a district in South-eastern Bangladesh. It is located in the Chittagong Division. Noakhali district, whose earlier name was Bhulua, was established in 1821. It was named Noakhali in 1868.

вЮ§LAKSHMIPUR or LAXMIPUR DISTRICT - а¶≤а¶ХаІНа¶ЈаІНа¶ЃаІАа¶™аІБа¶∞ а¶ЬаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ
(Lakshmipur Jela also Lakshmipur Zila) with an area of 1455.96 km¬≤, is a district of Bangladesh. It is bordered by Chandpur District to the north, Bhola and Noakhali districts to the south, Noakhali District to the east, and Barisal and Bhola districts to the west.
 It is located in the Chittagong Division. 

вЮ§FENI  DISTRICT - а¶ЂаІЗа¶®аІА а¶ЬаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ
Feni is a district located in the South-Eastern part of Bangladesh Administrative division of Chittagong . As of 2015, the district's estimated population stood at 1,437,371, making it the ninth-most populous district in Chittagong Division. Feni was the part of Greater Noakhali. The administrative hub of the district is in Feni Sadar, in the central section of the district. The original name of the district was Shamshernagar, which served as a sub-district under the district of Noakhali until 15 February 1984.[1] The district consists of six sub-districts: Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Parshuram, Daganbhuiyan, Chhagalnaiya and Feni Sadar.

Ruseya Hoya Ae Ve Tu Ki Sajjna
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna,
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna,

Ruseya Hoya A Ve Tu Ki Sajna
Kall Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajna
Deve Na Jawab Ve Tu Meri Call Da
Main Rova Tenu Disda Hi Nai Sajjna

Sach-Sach Das Ve Kar Hun Bass Ve
Mere Naal Lad-Lad Thakda Hi Nai

Main Tenu Vaar-Vaar Kardi Aan Phone
Wajje Ringtone, Tu Phone Mera Chakda Hi Nai,

Vaar-Vaar Kardi Aan Phone
Wajje Ringtone, Tu Phone Mera Chakda Hi Nai.


Main Hi Kyun Manavaan Har Var Sohneya
Tu Vi Taan Galat Huna Ae,

Subah To Main Sham Tak Takkan Teri Rahwan,
Har Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae,
Har Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae, Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae.

Hoya Ae Bukhar Ve Din Ho Gaye Char Ve
Fer Vi Satauno Mainu Akkda Hi Nai,

Main Tainu Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai,
Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai.



Khore ki ki chlda a mind ch tere jdo Ld pve bolda e nyi
Mrji'an ajkl jyada krda gl dil wali Kholda e nyi
Ravauna a aroob nu 
Jooth bole khoob tu 
Riyaz Ali roop ehe jachda e nai

Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai.

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But thereвАЩs an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar

snippet.title: All the Prime MinisterвАЩs Men  | Al Jazeera Investigations
snippet.description:
Click here for the Bangla Language: https://youtu.be/B1BM79J863o
An explosive investigation reveals how a criminal gang is colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh and has links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina.

Undercover reporters with the I-Unit expose how a former street mafia claims to have captured a state. The brother of BangladeshвАЩs army chief boasts that he can use police and paramilitary units to abduct rivals and earn millions in bribes.

Documents obtained by the I-Unit also show that head of the army has helped a convicted killer evade justice. And how the countryвАЩs military intelligence service has secretly bought spyware from Israel вАУ a country that Bangladesh does not recognise вАУ that can monitor the prime ministerвАЩs political rivals. 

The I-Unit invited all those involved in this investigation to respond to our findings. They included BangladeshвАЩs Prime Minister, Home Minister, Inspector General, Police Commissioner and all four Ahmed Brothers. 

None responded to our inquiries.

After the release of the investigation, BangladeshвАЩs Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement describing our findings as a вАЬsmear campaignвАЭ that was orchestrated by opponents of the regime based abroad.
It dismissed statements made by the brother of BangladeshвАЩs Chief of Army Staff s baseless and said Haris Ahmed had no links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina or any other state institution.

Check our website:  http://www.aljazeera.com/

snippet.title: CHAKRA KA RAHASYA Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie |Mehreen Pirzada
snippet.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fianc√© Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

For More Hindi Dubbed Movies :-

Damayanthi Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I_yhiZvEdUY&t=116s
Chalo (Nagashaurya) Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y5CJhgYf-Hc&t=149s
RX 100 Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_O_rAmKP-KY

About Bangladesh Cricket team:

The Bangladesh men's national cricket team (Bengali: а¶ђа¶Ња¶Ва¶≤а¶Ња¶¶аІЗа¶ґ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶§аІАа¶ѓа¶Љ а¶ХаІНа¶∞а¶ња¶ХаІЗа¶Я а¶¶а¶≤), popularly known as, The Tigers[citation needed] is administered by the Bangladesh Cricket Board (BCB). It is a Full Member of the International Cricket Council (ICC) with Test and One-Day International (ODI) status. It played its first Test match in November 2000 against India in Dhaka, becoming the tenth Test-playing nation.
 Bangladesh's first official foray into international cricket came in the 1979 ICC Trophy in England. On 31 March 1986, Bangladesh played its first ODI match, against Pakistan in the Asia Cup. For a long time, football was the most popular sport in Bangladesh, but cricket gradually became very popular вАУ particularly in urban areas вАУ and by the late 1990s had surpassed football.
Bangladesh made its full debut in international cricket in the 1986 Asia Cup.In 1997, Bangladesh won the ICC Trophy in Malaysia and thus qualified for its first Cricket World Cup to participate in England in 1999. There, it defeated Pakistan вАУ causing much upset вАУ and also Scotland. On 26 June 2000, Bangladesh was granted full ICC membership. 

Bangladesh holds the record for most consecutive losses in Tests (21, between 2000 and 2002) and ODIs (23, between 2001 and 2004). After gaining Full Member status with the ICC, Bangladesh had to wait until 2004 for its first ODI win since the 1999 World Cup. The team on the losing side on that occasion was Zimbabwe, who also participated in Bangladesh's maiden Test victory in 2005; by securing a draw in the second match, Bangladesh won their first Test series. In 2009 Bangladesh toured the West Indies for two Tests and by winning both secured their first overseas Test series victory.

As of 20 June 2019, Bangladesh has played 114 Tests, winning thirteen. Its first victory was against team Zimbabwe, and the next two came against the West Indian team. Results have improved predominantly at home with draws earned against New Zealand, Pakistan, India and South Africa and wins against England, Sri Lanka and Australia.[9] They played their 100th Test when they toured Sri Lanka in March 2017.[10]

About Bangladesh Cricket team:

The Bangladesh men's national cricket team (Bengali: а¶ђа¶Ња¶Ва¶≤а¶Ња¶¶аІЗа¶ґ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶§аІАа¶ѓа¶Љ а¶ХаІНа¶∞а¶ња¶ХаІЗа¶Я а¶¶а¶≤), popularly known as, The Tigers[citation needed] is administered by the Bangladesh Cricket Board (BCB). It is a Full Member of the International Cricket Council (ICC) with Test and One-Day International (ODI) status. It played its first Test match in November 2000 against India in Dhaka, becoming the tenth Test-playing nation.
 Bangladesh's first official foray into international cricket came in the 1979 ICC Trophy in England. On 31 March 1986, Bangladesh played its first ODI match, against Pakistan in the Asia Cup. For a long time, football was the most popular sport in Bangladesh, but cricket gradually became very popular вАУ particularly in urban areas вАУ and by the late 1990s had surpassed football.
Bangladesh made its full debut in international cricket in the 1986 Asia Cup.In 1997, Bangladesh won the ICC Trophy in Malaysia and thus qualified for its first Cricket World Cup to participate in England in 1999. There, it defeated Pakistan вАУ causing much upset вАУ and also Scotland. On 26 June 2000, Bangladesh was granted full ICC membership. 

Bangladesh holds the record for most consecutive losses in Tests (21, between 2000 and 2002) and ODIs (23, between 2001 and 2004). After gaining Full Member status with the ICC, Bangladesh had to wait until 2004 for its first ODI win since the 1999 World Cup. The team on the losing side on that occasion was Zimbabwe, who also participated in Bangladesh's maiden Test victory in 2005; by securing a draw in the second match, Bangladesh won their first Test series. In 2009 Bangladesh toured the West Indies for two Tests and by winning both secured their first overseas Test series victory.

As of 20 June 2019, Bangladesh has played 114 Tests, winning thirteen. Its first victory was against team Zimbabwe, and the next two came against the West Indian team. Results have improved predominantly at home with draws earned against New Zealand, Pakistan, India and South Africa and wins against England, Sri Lanka and Australia.[9] They played their 100th Test when they toured Sri Lanka in March 2017.[10]

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вАЩ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вАЩ and 85вАЩ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вАЩ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вАЩ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвАЩs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвАЩs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. Bongo is  the first and biggest streaming video-on-demand service in Bangladesh. Bongo boasts an ever growing library of over 15.000 full movies, dramas, TV shows, music videos and songs. This unique collection of Bangladeshi content is available through our website, mobile app and other syndicated video delivery media. Bongo has already been recognized with a top start-up in Bangladesh award and has received acclaim from Silicon Valley and European based investment.

Bongo is the first online video service in Bangladesh to be actively involved in creating original content. Our aim is to publish a new episode of original creative content every day, for our wide audience.

Apart from Bongo Originals, our library contains aggregated contents from some of the biggest Labels and TV Channels in Bangladesh. All their content will be available on Bongo including all new releases.

Bongo is the perfect platform for young and upcoming talent to publish their songs, movies or sketches. Always looking for creative and quality content, Bongo offers a win-win situation for content creators and publishers alike. Please contact us for more info on publishing your work on Bongo.

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award¬Ѓ winner Emma Stone (вАЬLa La LandвАЭ) stars in DisneyвАЩs вАЬCruella,вАЭ an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious вАУ and notoriously fashionable вАУ villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. вАЬCruella,вАЭ which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, EstellaвАЩs flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar¬Ѓ winner Emma Thompson (вАЬHowards End,вАЭ вАЬSense & SensibilityвАЭ). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
¬†
DisneyвАЩs вАЬCruellaвАЭ is directed by Craig Gillespie (вАЬI TonyaвАЭ) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (вАЬFreaky FridayвАЭ), Marc Platt (вАЬMary Poppins ReturnsвАЭ) and Kristin Burr (вАЬChristopher RobinвАЭ), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar¬Ѓ- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (вАЬMad Max: Fury Road,вАЭ вАЬA Room with a ViewвАЭ) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on вАЬCruella,вАЭ follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:¬†https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:¬†https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailersвАЛ
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.description:
WeвАЩve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereвАЩs what we created. ArenвАЩt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letвАЩs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. Presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвАЩt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвАЩs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вАФ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвАЩs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвАЩt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вАФ The pacifier hack 

2:42 вАФ A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вАФ The getting along/best friendsвАЩ shirt

snippet.title: Bangladesh: When will authorities clean up their act? | Conflict Zone
snippet.description:
For years, the government of Bangladesh has been criticized for its human rights record. Its reputation received another jolt this month with allegations of high-level bribery and corruption. DWвАЩs Conflict Zone host Tim Sebastian confronts Gowher Rizvi, foreign affairs adviser to the countryвАЩs prime minister. 

Watch the program and let us know what you think below or join the conversation on Facebook¬†вАФ¬†https://www.facebook.com/dw.conflictzone¬†Conflict Zone is Deutsche Welle's top political interview. а¶Жа¶≤аІЛ а¶Эа¶≤а¶Ѓа¶≤ а¶єа¶≤аІЛ а¶∞а¶Ња¶Ьа¶ґа¶Ња¶єаІАа¶∞ а¶Єа¶ња¶Яа¶њ а¶ђа¶Ња¶За¶™а¶Ња¶Є а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха•§ а¶Йа¶®аІНа¶®а¶§ а¶ђа¶ња¶ґаІНа¶ђаІЗа¶∞ а¶®а¶Ња¶ЃаІА а¶ґа¶єа¶∞а¶ЧаІБа¶≤аІЛа¶∞ а¶Ѓа¶§аІЛ а¶¶аІЗа¶ґаІЗа¶∞ а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶•а¶Ѓ а¶Єа¶ња¶Яа¶њ а¶єа¶ња¶ЄаІЗа¶ђаІЗ а¶Па¶Ѓа¶® а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶њ а¶Єа¶Ва¶ѓаІЛа¶Ьа¶ња¶§ а¶єа¶≤аІЛа•§ а¶Па¶З а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶Яа¶ња¶∞ а¶¶а¶ња¶® а¶У а¶∞а¶Ња¶§аІЗа¶∞ а¶ЄаІМа¶®аІНа¶¶а¶∞аІНа¶ѓ а¶Іа¶∞аІЗ а¶∞а¶Ња¶Ца¶§аІЗ а¶®а¶Ча¶∞а¶ђа¶Ња¶ЄаІАа¶∞ а¶Єа¶єа¶ѓаІЛа¶Ча¶ња¶§а¶Њ а¶Ъа¶Ња¶За¶≤аІЗа¶® а¶ЃаІЗаІЯа¶∞а•§ 

а¶™а¶ња¶Ъ а¶Ґа¶Ња¶≤а¶Њ а¶™а¶•а•§ а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶ЭаІЗа¶∞ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Х а¶ђа¶ња¶≠а¶Ња¶Ьа¶®а¶Яа¶ња¶§аІЗ а¶Жа¶Ба¶Ха¶Њ а¶Жа¶ЫаІЗ а¶®а¶Ња¶®а¶Њ а¶Жа¶≤а¶™а¶®а¶Ња•§ а¶ѓа¶Њ а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶њ а¶Ха¶ЊаІЬаІЗ а¶Уа¶З а¶™а¶• а¶¶а¶њаІЯаІЗ а¶Ъа¶≤а¶Њ а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶®аІБа¶Ја¶ХаІЗа•§ а¶Па¶ђа¶Ња¶∞ а¶ЄаІЗа¶З а¶ЄаІЬа¶ХаІЗ а¶ђа¶Єа¶Ња¶®аІЛ а¶єа¶≤аІЛ а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња•§

а¶¶аІВа¶∞ а¶•аІЗа¶ХаІЗ а¶¶аІЗа¶ЦаІЗ а¶ѓаІЗа¶ХаІЗа¶Й а¶Ѓа¶®аІЗ а¶Ха¶∞а¶§аІЗ а¶™а¶Ња¶∞аІЗа¶®, а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Ьа¶Ња¶™а¶§а¶ња¶∞ а¶Єа¶Ња¶∞а¶њ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ЬаІБаІЬаІЗа•§ а¶¶а¶ња¶®аІЗ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ЬаІБаІЬаІЗ а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Ьа¶Ња¶™а¶§а¶ња¶∞ а¶ЃаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ, а¶Жа¶∞ а¶∞а¶Ња¶§аІЗа¶∞ а¶Жа¶≤аІЛаІЯ а¶ЃаІБа¶ЧаІНа¶І а¶™а¶•а¶Ъа¶Ња¶∞аІАа¶∞а¶Ња•§

а¶∞а¶Ња¶Ьа¶ґа¶Ња¶єаІА а¶Ѓа¶єа¶Ња¶®а¶Ча¶∞аІАа¶∞ а¶ђа¶єа¶∞а¶Ѓа¶™аІБа¶∞ а¶∞аІЗа¶≤а¶ХаІНа¶∞а¶Єа¶ња¶В а¶•аІЗа¶ХаІЗ а¶Ха¶Ња¶ґа¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶°а¶Ња¶ЩаІНа¶Ча¶Њ а¶ЃаІЛаІЬ а¶™а¶∞аІНа¶ѓа¶®аІНа¶§ а¶Ъа¶Ња¶∞а¶≤аІЗа¶® а¶ЄаІЬа¶ХаІЗ а¶ђа¶Єа¶Ња¶®аІЛ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶Па¶З а¶Жа¶ІаІБа¶®а¶ња¶Х а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња•§ а¶ђа¶ња¶¶аІЗа¶ґ а¶•аІЗа¶ХаІЗ а¶Жа¶Ѓа¶¶а¶Ња¶®а¶њ а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶Па¶Ѓа¶® а¶ЄаІЬа¶Х а¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶њ а¶¶аІЗа¶ґаІЗа¶∞ а¶ХаІЛа¶®аІЛ а¶ґа¶єа¶∞аІЗ а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶•а¶Ѓа•§

а¶Па¶Ха¶¶а¶ња¶ХаІЗ а¶Жа¶≤аІЛа¶∞ а¶Ъа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶¶а¶Њ а¶™аІВа¶∞а¶£, а¶™а¶Ња¶ґа¶Ња¶™а¶Ња¶ґа¶њ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶Яа¶ња¶ХаІЗ а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶Ха¶∞а¶ЫаІЗ а¶Па¶Ѓа¶® а¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња•§ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶Яа¶ња¶∞ а¶ЄаІМа¶®аІНа¶¶а¶∞аІНа¶ѓ а¶Іа¶∞аІЗ а¶∞а¶Ња¶Ца¶§аІЗ а¶§а¶Ња¶З а¶®а¶Ча¶∞а¶ђа¶Ња¶ЄаІАа¶∞ а¶Єа¶єа¶ѓаІЛа¶Ча¶ња¶§а¶Њ а¶Ъа¶Ња¶За¶≤аІЗа¶® а¶ЃаІЗаІЯа¶∞а•§

аІ™ а¶¶а¶ґа¶Ѓа¶ња¶Х аІ® а¶Ха¶ња¶≤аІЛа¶Ѓа¶ња¶Яа¶Ња¶∞ а¶ЄаІЬа¶ХаІЗ аІІаІ≠аІ™а¶Яа¶њ а¶ЦаІБа¶Ба¶Яа¶ња¶§аІЗ а¶ђа¶Єа¶Ња¶®аІЛ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ аІ©аІ™аІЃа¶Яа¶њ а¶Жа¶ІаІБа¶®а¶ња¶Х а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња•§ а¶Па¶§аІЗ а¶ђаІНа¶ѓаІЯ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ аІЂ а¶ХаІЛа¶Яа¶њ аІ®аІ® а¶≤а¶Ња¶Ц а¶Яа¶Ња¶Ха¶Ња•§

а¶Ха¶Ња¶ЬаІА а¶ґа¶Ња¶єаІЗа¶¶/а¶®а¶ња¶Йа¶Ь а¶ЯаІЛаІЯаІЗа¶®аІНа¶Яа¶ња¶ЂаІЛа¶∞/а¶∞а¶Ња¶Ьа¶ґа¶Ња¶єаІА

а¶™а¶ња¶Ъ а¶Ґа¶Ња¶≤а¶Њ а¶™а¶•а•§ а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶ЭаІЗа¶∞ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Х а¶ђа¶ња¶≠а¶Ња¶Ьа¶®а¶Яа¶ња¶§аІЗ а¶Жа¶Ба¶Ха¶Њ а¶Жа¶ЫаІЗ а¶®а¶Ња¶®а¶Њ а¶Жа¶≤а¶™а¶®а¶Ња•§ а¶ѓа¶Њ а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶њ а¶Ха¶ЊаІЬаІЗ а¶Уа¶З а¶™а¶• а¶¶а¶њаІЯаІЗ а¶Ъа¶≤а¶Њ а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶®аІБа¶Ја¶ХаІЗа•§ а¶Па¶ђа¶Ња¶∞ а¶ЄаІЗа¶З а¶ЄаІЬа¶ХаІЗ а¶ђа¶Єа¶Ња¶®аІЛ а¶єа¶≤аІЛ а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња•§

а¶¶аІВа¶∞ а¶•аІЗа¶ХаІЗ а¶¶аІЗа¶ЦаІЗ а¶ѓаІЗа¶ХаІЗа¶Й а¶Ѓа¶®аІЗ а¶Ха¶∞а¶§аІЗ а¶™а¶Ња¶∞аІЗа¶®, а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Ьа¶Ња¶™а¶§а¶ња¶∞ а¶Єа¶Ња¶∞а¶њ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ЬаІБаІЬаІЗа•§ а¶¶а¶ња¶®аІЗ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ЬаІБаІЬаІЗ а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Ьа¶Ња¶™а¶§а¶ња¶∞ а¶ЃаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ, а¶Жа¶∞ а¶∞а¶Ња¶§аІЗа¶∞ а¶Жа¶≤аІЛаІЯ а¶ЃаІБа¶ЧаІНа¶І а¶™а¶•а¶Ъа¶Ња¶∞аІАа¶∞а¶Ња•§

а¶∞а¶Ња¶Ьа¶ґа¶Ња¶єаІА а¶Ѓа¶єа¶Ња¶®а¶Ча¶∞аІАа¶∞ а¶ђа¶єа¶∞а¶Ѓа¶™аІБа¶∞ а¶∞аІЗа¶≤а¶ХаІНа¶∞а¶Єа¶ња¶В а¶•аІЗа¶ХаІЗ а¶Ха¶Ња¶ґа¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶°а¶Ња¶ЩаІНа¶Ча¶Њ а¶ЃаІЛаІЬ а¶™а¶∞аІНа¶ѓа¶®аІНа¶§ а¶Ъа¶Ња¶∞а¶≤аІЗа¶® а¶ЄаІЬа¶ХаІЗ а¶ђа¶Єа¶Ња¶®аІЛ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶Па¶З а¶Жа¶ІаІБа¶®а¶ња¶Х а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња•§ а¶ђа¶ња¶¶аІЗа¶ґ а¶•аІЗа¶ХаІЗ а¶Жа¶Ѓа¶¶а¶Ња¶®а¶њ а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶Па¶Ѓа¶® а¶ЄаІЬа¶Х а¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶њ а¶¶аІЗа¶ґаІЗа¶∞ а¶ХаІЛа¶®аІЛ а¶ґа¶єа¶∞аІЗ а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶•а¶Ѓа•§

а¶Па¶Ха¶¶а¶ња¶ХаІЗ а¶Жа¶≤аІЛа¶∞ а¶Ъа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶¶а¶Њ а¶™аІВа¶∞а¶£, а¶™а¶Ња¶ґа¶Ња¶™а¶Ња¶ґа¶њ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶Яа¶ња¶ХаІЗ а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶Ха¶∞а¶ЫаІЗ а¶Па¶Ѓа¶® а¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња•§ а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶Яа¶ња¶∞ а¶ЄаІМа¶®аІНа¶¶а¶∞аІНа¶ѓ а¶Іа¶∞аІЗ а¶∞а¶Ња¶Ца¶§аІЗ а¶§а¶Ња¶З а¶®а¶Ча¶∞а¶ђа¶Ња¶ЄаІАа¶∞ а¶Єа¶єа¶ѓаІЛа¶Ча¶ња¶§а¶Њ а¶Ъа¶Ња¶За¶≤аІЗа¶® а¶ЃаІЗаІЯа¶∞а•§

аІ™ а¶¶а¶ґа¶Ѓа¶ња¶Х аІ® а¶Ха¶ња¶≤аІЛа¶Ѓа¶ња¶Яа¶Ња¶∞ а¶ЄаІЬа¶ХаІЗ аІІаІ≠аІ™а¶Яа¶њ а¶ЦаІБа¶Ба¶Яа¶ња¶§аІЗ а¶ђа¶Єа¶Ња¶®аІЛ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ аІ©аІ™аІЃа¶Яа¶њ а¶Жа¶ІаІБа¶®а¶ња¶Х а¶¶аІГа¶ЈаІНа¶Яа¶ња¶®а¶®аІНа¶¶а¶® а¶ЄаІЬа¶Ха¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња•§ а¶Па¶§аІЗ а¶ђаІНа¶ѓаІЯ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ аІЂ а¶ХаІЛа¶Яа¶њ аІ®аІ® а¶≤а¶Ња¶Ц а¶Яа¶Ња¶Ха¶Ња•§

snippet.title: Kaabil Full Hindi Movie | Hritik Roshan & Yami Gautam New Bollywood HD Movies 2021 | New Hindi Films
snippet.description:
Kaabil (transl.вАЙCapable) is a 2017 Indian Hindi-language action thriller film[7][8] directed by Sanjay Gupta, written by Vijay Kumar Mishra, produced by Rakesh Roshan under his banner FilmKraft Productions.[9] It stars Hrithik Roshan, Yami Gautam, Ronit Roy and Rohit Roy. The music was composed by Rajesh Roshan. Principal photography of the film began on 30 March 2016.[10]

The film follows a blind voiceover artist who becomes disillusioned when his wife is raped and the perpetrators walk free. He becomes a vigilante and decides to seek revenge against those responsible for his wife's death, while also dodging police with a cover that no one would believe a blind man can kill someone.

Kaabil was released theatrically on 25 January 2017.[11][12] Roshan received the Nomination of Filmfare Award for Best Actor for his performance at the 63rd Filmfare Awards. In 2019, it was also released in China where it became commercially unsuccessful.[13]

snippet.title: CID (Bengali) - а¶ЄаІАа¶Жа¶За¶°аІА - At The Store - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click to watch all the episodes of CID - 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5O3zv2ZcASgNl2V1M1Y8fEFWuo4_wIXb

Episode 409 : At The Store
-------------------------------------------
Three Friends - one blind, one mute, and one deaf are at a grocery store when they witness a crime taking place. A woman wearing a burkha and carrying a child is being chased by another man when impulsively she gives the baby to the deaf guy and leaves the store. The friends call CID, confused about what they should do. 

About CID:
--------------------
CID is an Indian detective television anthology series about India's Crime Investigation Department, created by B. P. Singh for Sony Entertainment Television India and Sony Entertainment Television Asia.  Following a pilot episode on 29 April 1997, the series premiered on 21 January 1998 and is the longest-running television series in India, having completed 19 years in January 2017 and entering the 20th year of its run. The show airs on Saturday and Sunday nights at 10:30 PM IST.
